arts.ttl: Finland vs England: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: England suffered a bruising defeat to Greece in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday and will be aiming for redemption against Finland this Sunday in Helsinki. England have several absentees ahead of Sunday's encounter in the Finnish capital, with Bukayo Saka sustaining a hamstring injury in the defeat to Greece.

arts.ttl: Report: Lee Carsley does not want full-time England job
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley does not want the permanent Three Lions job, according to reports. But the plan is to give this job [England's senior side] for three camps the best I can do along with the rest of the staff and hopefully we can be in a good position.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher sends message to England boss Lee Carsley after Greece horror show
arts.sum: Lee Carsley employed an attacking England lineup against Greece, albeit without a striker, but saw the Three Lions look vulnerable in defence and now they must bounce back against Finland

arts.ttl: Carsley expects reaction from England in Finland
arts.sum: Interim manager Lee Carsley anticipates a reaction from his England side against Finland as he reverts to a more familiar formation, with captain Harry Kane set to return from injury.
